scripts.build:docker: docker build -t learningmodules-server:latest . && mkdir -p dist && docker save learningmodules-server:latest > dist/learningmodules-server.tar
scripts.build:docker-arm64: docker buildx build --platform linux/arm64 -t learningmodules-server:latest . --load && mkdir -p dist && docker save learningmodules-server:latest > dist/learningmodules-server.tar
